metadata.title: Architecture Firm | AdonERP
metadata.description: AI-powered architecture firm management platform for all your professional services — from project management and quotations to timesheets, invoicing, and resource planning.

hero.title: Architecture Firm
hero.description: Handle all your projects, from gathering leads and creating quotations to managing tasks, signing plans, and logging timesheets.
hero.testimonialQuote: AdonERP's automation has reduced human error and increased productivity, allowing employees to focus on activities that add the most value.

projectSection.description: Centralize dashboards, handle recurring tasks, organize activities, and keep every project moving smoothly.

cards.custom: Create custom quotations aligned with your project scope, pricing, files, blueprints, and architectural services.
cards.templates: Use templates and built-in quote tools to make proposals faster and more professional.

flexibleInvoicing.title: Flexible invoicing.
flexibleInvoicing.description: Invoice clients based on fixed rates, time and material, or milestones.

analyticalBreakdowns.title: Analytical breakdowns
analyticalBreakdowns.description: Help track profitability and costs on each project.

resourceSection.title: Resource
resourceSection.description: Create shifts, track colleagues, material resources, planning, recruiting shifts and project timelines.

featuresSection.title: All the features
featuresSection.subtitle: done right.
featuresSection.description: Complete tools for architecture projects, quotes, planning, signatures, timesheets and invoicing.

list.title: CRM pipeline
list.description: Track leads, proposals, and project stages from one dashboard.

list.title: Custom quotations
list.description: Create professional quotes aligned with project scope and pricing.

list.title: Quote Calculator
list.description: Calculate costs automatically based on materials, labor, and services.

list.title: Valid electronic signatures
list.description: Collect legally binding signatures on contracts from any device.

list.title: Integrated timesheets
list.description: Track billable hours and project costs accurately.

list.title: Easy invoicing
list.description: Generate invoices based on fixed rates, time & material, or milestones.

appsSection.title: One need, one app.
appsSection.description: Expand as you grow with connected apps for your architecture firm, project management, client relationships, and financials.

testimonials.name: Michael Chen
testimonials.content: AdonERP's automation has reduced human error and increased productivity, allowing employees to focus on activities that add the most value.

testimonials.name: Isabella Rossi
testimonials.content: From project quotes to timesheets and invoicing, AdonERP transformed our workflow. We now deliver projects faster and with better profitability tracking.

ctaBanner.title: Join 15 million happy users
ctaBanner.description: who grow their business with AdonERP — the complete solution for architecture firms and design studios.

footerCta.title: Unleash
footerCta.subtitle: your growth potential
footerCta.description: Launch an architecture firm workflow that helps you manage projects, create professional quotes, and track profitability.
